## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build:prod`

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit generated `dist/` files or release zips.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, or private form data.
- [ ] I documented any `src/manifest.json` permission changes.
- [ ] I included screenshots or recordings for UI changes when useful.
